title: Fix Salesforce Sandbox Login Routing to test.salesforce.com
story: As a DataTools Pro user with a Salesforce sandbox, I want to authenticate against test.salesforce.com instead of login.salesforce.com, so that sandbox logins work correctly.
description:
Both production and sandbox Salesforce logins were routing to `login.salesforce.com`. Sandbox logins need to route to `test.salesforce.com` instead.

### Root Cause
The Laravel Socialite Salesforce provider needed the `instance_url` additional config key to differentiate between production and sandbox environments.

### Fix
Configured the `instance_url` in the Salesforce Socialite provider's `additionalConfigKeys()` so sandbox users are routed to `test.salesforce.com`.
acceptance_criteria: Production users continue to authenticate against login.salesforce.com
middleware_changes: Updated Salesforce Socialite provider to use instance_url for routing sandbox vs production login.
implementation_notes: Uses Laravel Socialite's additionalConfigKeys to pass instance_url. Customer notified after fix deployed.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the issue and deployed to staging and production. Ryan notified the customer to test.
